# GuessThePerson - Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Multiplayer "Guess Who" style game where players use their phone contacts to play with friends.

**Tech Stack:**
- Frontend: React + Capacitor (iOS/Android + Web)
- Backend: Node.js + Express + Socket.io
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Contact Import: Native phone contacts via Capacitor Plugin

## Setup Checklist

- [ ] Verify project structure created
- [ ] Set up backend with Express, Socket.io, TypeScript
- [ ] Set up frontend with React + Capacitor, TypeScript
- [ ] Create database schema for PostgreSQL
- [ ] Install dependencies for both backend and frontend
- [ ] Configure environment variables
- [ ] Run development servers
- [ ] Verify real-time communication works
- [ ] Test contact import functionality

## Development Commands
Backend: `cd backend && npm run dev`
Frontend: `cd frontend && npm run dev` (web) or `npm run ios/android` (mobile)

## Next Steps
1. Review project structure
2. Install dependencies
3. Set up database connections
4. Run development servers
